sourcesContent:
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader } from '@material-ui/core'
import React from 'react'

function JoinClass() {
  return (
    <Card variant='outlined'>
        <CardHeader title='Join Classroom' />
        <CardContent>
                Join Classroom here
        </CardContent>
        <CardActions>
        <Button size="small">Learn More</Button>
      </CardActions>
    </Card>
  )
}

export default JoinClass
